hero.subtitle: GrindLab analyzes every decision in your tournament history, identifies your most costly error patterns, and delivers a study plan built from your real data, not generic theory everyone already knows.
hero.levels: 7 progression levels: from Beginner to Elite

demo.why: Equity 31% below the required (38%). Call without odds: a preflop defense leak.

howItWorks.heading: From HH file to precise diagnosis
howItWorks.step1Desc: Upload the .txt file from any tournament (PokerStars or GGPoker). Multiple files supported at once.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Each decision is evaluated by equity, position, and MTT/SNG context. The detection engine crosses frequency with impact, and shows you exactly what's costing you chips.
howItWorks.step3Title: Improve with focus on what matters
howItWorks.step3Desc: Study plan built on your own error patterns, not generic content. Track progression through the 7-level system.

features.heading: Why GrindLab is different
features.f1Desc: The diagnosis is built on your own tournaments. Every identified leak exists in your real history.
features.f2Desc: Leaks are ranked by frequency × severity. You focus on what's actually costing you chips, not what's easiest to study.
features.f3Desc: Study cards generated for each specific error spot, with diagnosis, exercise, and resources, not generic content.
features.f4Desc: M-ratio, ICM pressure, tournament stage, position, the engine evaluates every decision with the right context, not isolated equity.
features.f5Desc: Hand-by-hand review with detailed explanation of each critical action, understand what you got wrong and why.
features.f6Desc: 7 progression levels with clear metrics. You know exactly where you stand and what it takes to advance.

plans.heading: Simple and transparent
plans.details: Start free. Upgrade based on how often you play.
plans.manualActivation: Paid plans activated manually by email within 24h · No credit card required
plans.proF7: Advanced AI insights (Strategic Twin, Cognitive, Causal Map)

cta.heading: Your leaks already exist. You just don't know which ones.
cta.desc: Import your first tournament now, in minutes you'll know exactly where you're losing chips.
